summary: A Fox News 'The Faulkner Focus' broadcast segment about DHS/ICE arresting 5,000 'worst of the worst' criminal illegal aliens in Los Angeles since June. It shows a network 'WORST OF THE WORST ARRESTED' graphic with mugshots and offense labels, arrest B-roll from LA, and a Washington Examiner op-ed quote card, all under Fox chyrons. It is a straight TV news clip, not a produced or music-driven youth-appeal piece.
notable_text: FOX NEWS / THE FAULKNER FOCUS / WORST OF THE WORST ARRESTED / TOTAL 5,000 CRIMINAL ILLEGAL ALIENS ARRESTED IN LOS ANGELES SINCE JUNE / 'DHS AND ICE DESERVE PRAISE FOR ARRESTING 5,000 ILLEGAL MIGRANTS IN LOS ANGELES' (Washington Examiner)
